common.serverUnreachable: Unable to reach the server. Check that the backend is running and that CORS allows the frontend URL.

banner.unverified: Your email address is not verified yet. Check your inbox{{suffix}}
banner.resendError: Unable to resend the email right now.

home.subtitle: Upload your course material, EduTutor generates 10 multiple-choice questions, grades you and spots your weak areas. Everything runs on your machine, open source.
home.cardUploadBody: PDF up to 5 MB or pasted text. Everything stays local on your machine.
home.cardGenerateBody: Llama via Ollama. No paid API, no data leakage.
home.cardProgressBody: Score history, identified weak areas and targeted review.
home.kitBody: This frontend is intentionally minimal — it is up to you to enrich it during the week. Check the

signup.title: Create an account
signup.closedBody: Registrations are currently disabled. Please try again later.
signup.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.intro: Enter your email address: if an account exists, you will receive a link to choose a new password.

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.invalidLink: Incomplete or invalid link. Start a new request from
resetPassword.intro: Choose a new password (at least 8 characters).
resetPassword.mismatch: The two passwords do not match.

upload.title: Create a new quiz
upload.intro: Upload a PDF or paste text. EduTutor IA generates 10 multiple-choice questions.
upload.textPlaceholder: Paste your course content here (at least 200 characters)…
upload.durationHint: Generation may take 1 to 5 minutes depending on your machine (much faster with a GPU or a lighter model).
upload.submitting: Generating… (1 to 5 min on CPU, please wait)
upload.languageUsed: The quiz will be generated in the currently selected language.

quiz.resultPerfect: Perfect score. You have mastered this chapter.
quiz.resultGood: Good result. Review the missed questions below.
quiz.resultAverage: You know the basics, but more revision is needed.
quiz.resultPoor: You need to review the course in depth.

history.title: My history
history.emptyLead: No quiz yet — create your first one.
history.emptyBody: No quiz in your history yet.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Your progress on EduTutor IA.
dashboard.emptyBody: Take your first quiz to see your statistics here.
dashboard.scoresHint: Each bar = one completed quiz, in chronological order. Hover to see details.

review.title: Review my mistakes
review.emptyBody: You have no mistake to review. Take a quiz to practise.
